---
name: process-backlog
description: "Use when: process my backlog, daily ops, triage inbox, classify backlog items"
---

Read [BACKLOG.md](../../BACKLOG.md) and classify each item as one of: ignore, delegate, discuss, decide, plan, execute.

For each item that is not `ignore`:
- state the classification and why
- identify the owner (ask if missing)
- suggest the next action with a due date or checkpoint

For `decide` or `discuss` items, route to the appropriate workflow per [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md#routing).

After triage, summarize:
- top 3 management attention items
- any blockers needing escalation
- items ready to move to Artifacts/
